title: launchCaseCollectionByPathRequest
description: Schema for launchCaseCollectionByPathRequest in Nuix ECC REST API

caseId.description: id of the case within which to start a collection

computerId.description: GUID value that identifies the computer

configurationId.description: id of the collection configuration to use for collection criteria

location.description: destination of the collection (if blank uses the location defined in the specified collection configuration)

label.description: optional, label to be assigned to all tasks within this collection

autodetect.description:
optional, auto-detect option to be used instead of files/folders.

If specified, must be `AllLocalVolumes`.

Note that if autodetect is used, the folders and files fields are ignored

folders.description: full path(s) of folder(s) to collect from on each target computer

files.description: full path(s) of file(s) to collect from each target computer

folderSpec.description: optional way to specify folders, allowing for exclusions within each specified folder
